name: rabbit-spec
summary: Owner of the rabbit workflow's spec-lifecycle skills. Hosts rabbit-spec-create (drafts initial spec bodies via the read-only rabbit-spec-creator subagent) and rabbit-spec-update (revises existing specs; absorbed from rabbit-feature/rabbit-feature-spec).
deprecation_criterion: when Claude Code exposes native spec-lifecycle skills that supersede this feature
spec_no_change_reason: Spec amended this cycle (bumped 1.14.0 -> 1.15.0): measured-reduction wave. Cut restated rationale from Inv 3(b) (downstream consumption owned by rabbit-spec-create Step 4) and Inv 3(e) (parents[0..4] path-arithmetic enumeration + expanded forbidden-mechanism prose, both owned by the dispatch script comment). All load-bearing tokens kept; no invariant renumbered. New E2E guard test-no-restated-rationale.py forbids the removed restatement and asserts the load-bearing tokens survive.
